cards.back: Hive is an open-source data warehousing and SQL-like query language for Hadoop
Hive architecture consists of a metastore, a query compiler, and a execution engine
Hive data types include int, string, timestamp, date, and array
Hive supports Parquet, ORC, Avro, and Text file formats
A Hive query is a query written in Hive Query Language (HQL) to query data in a Hive table
